title: Formula is not working when calculating with other column values
excerpt: Hi, I have created a formula column that I want to divide the values in two other columns. But when I add the percentage option, the formula does not calculate the values correctly.

posts.author: jennabeaudry (Jenna Beaudry)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I have created a formula column that I want to divide the values in two other columns. But when I add the percentage option, the formula does not calculate the values correctly.

posts.author: ggozalova (Nay Gozalova)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jenna,

Could you possible share the formulas here with a screenshot?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@jennabeaudry ,
the formula you are using to divide the values in two columns and calculate the percentage is probably incorrect. The correct formula should be:

DIVIDE({Column1},{Column2})*100.
If you are still having trouble getting the formula to work correctly.
Try using a different formula, such as the AVERAGE() function, to calculate the percentage.
